# Definition Of Done

## Hard Gates

| Gate | Required result | Evidence path |
|---|---|---|
| P0/P1 acceptance | pass | docs/AcceptanceCriteria.md |
| lint/typecheck/test/build | pass where applicable | docs/EvalReport.md |
| UI audit | pass when UI exists | docs/UIAudit.md, artifacts/screenshots/ |
| security/privacy | no unresolved blocker | docs/EvalReport.md |
| local deployment | smoke test pass | docs/DeploymentReport.md |
| final score | >= target score | docs/EvalReport.md |
| long-task summary | complete | docs/LongTaskSummary.md |

## Score Targets

| Score | Target |
|---|---:|
| final weighted score | 99 |
| UI score when UI exists | 97 |
| architecture plan score | 90 |
| UI plan score | 90 |

## Completion Statement

Do not mark the task successful if any hard gate is missing, skipped without reason, or blocked.
